mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)
mapper.select: SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.user_id, p.portfolio_name, p.portfolio_type, p.source_dimension, p.source_condition, p.description, p.portfolio_style, p.risk_level, p.avg_risk_score, p.avg_total_score, p.tracking_enabled, COUNT(r.fund_id) AS fund_count, p.created_time, p.updated_time FROM fund_portfolio p LEFT JOIN portfolio_fund_relation r ON r.portfolio_id = p.portfolio_id WHERE p.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} GROUP BY p.portfolio_id, p.user_id, p.portfolio_name, p.portfolio_type, p.source_dimension, p.source_condition, p.description, p.portfolio_style, p.risk_level, p.avg_risk_score, p.avg_total_score, p.tracking_enabled, p.created_time, p.updated_time

SELECT r.relation_id, r.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, c.company_name, s.total_score, s.recommend_level, r.weight, r.add_source, r.snapshot_score, r.snapshot_return_1y, r.snapshot_max_drawdown, r.remark, r.created_time FROM portfolio_fund_relation r INNER JOIN fund_info f ON f.fund_id = r.fund_id LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN s ON s.fund_id = f.fund_id WHERE r.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} ORDER BY r.created_time ASC, r.relation_id ASC
SELECT total_score FROM fund_score WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY score_date DESC LIMIT 1
